context: Verify that the agent uses the enzyme template, validates output before saving, and prints results for review.

checklist.name: enzyme template used
checklist.description: The agent invokes ./scripts/extractor.py with --template enzyme and specifies kinetics_study.pdf as input.

checklist.name: output saved to results.md
checklist.description: The agent passes -o results.md to the script and the file is created with Markdown table content.

checklist.name: results printed to terminal for review
checklist.description: The agent uses --print flag or otherwise displays the extracted table before confirming success.

checklist.name: no API key exposed in command or output
checklist.description: The agent does not print or log the EXTRACTOR_API_KEY value at any point.
